rewritten_requirements: The system shall transition from the Door Shut state to the Door Open state when the user opens the door.
The system shall transition from the Door Open state to the Door Open with Item state when the user places an item in the oven.
The system shall transition from the Door Open with Item state to the Door Shut with Item state when the user closes the door.
The system shall enter the Ready to Cook state after the user inputs the cooking time.
The system shall transition from the Ready to Cook state to the Cooking state when the user presses the Start button.
The system shall leave the Cooking state and reenter the Door Shut with Item state when the timer expires.
The system shall transition from the Cooking state to the Door Open with Item state if the door is opened during cooking.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Transition from Door Shut to Door Open when user opens the door
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The statechart transitions into the Door Open state.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Transition from Door Open to Door Open with Item when user places an item in the oven
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: causing the statechart to transition into the Door Open with Item state

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Transition from Door Open with Item to Door Shut with Item when user closes the door
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the statechart then transitions into the Door Shut with Item state

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enter Ready to Cook state after user inputs cooking time
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After the user inputs the cooking time, the Ready to Cook state is entered.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Transition from Ready to Cook to Cooking when user presses Start button
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the user presses the Start button, which causes the statechart to transition into the Cooking state

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Leave Cooking state and reenter Door Shut with Item when timer expires
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the timer expires, the statechart leaves the Cooking state and reenters the Door Shut with Item state

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Transition from Cooking to Door Open with Item if door is opened during cooking
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If instead the door were opened during cooking, the statechart would enter the Door Open with Item state
